title: emacs
html:
emacs

File Read

Context: sudo, unprivileged

emacs /path/to/input-file

File Write

Context: sudo, unprivileged

emacs /path/to/output-file
DATA
C-x C-s

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

emacs -Q -nw --eval '(term "/bin/sh")'
